description: MetaTrader 5 integration service for connection, data fetching, order placement, and position management

userStories.title: Install and configure MetaTrader5 Python library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the MetaTrader5 Python library installed to communicate with MT5 terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Check MT5 terminal is installed and accessible
Verify Python can import MetaTrader5 module
Document MT5 requirements (terminal must be running)
userStories.notes: Successfully installed MetaTrader5 library version 5.0.5488 in requirements.txt, verified import and initialization work correctly, checked MT5 terminal installation path, created comprehensive test script at backend/tests/test_mt5_installation.py with 3/3 tests passing, documented MT5 setup requirements in backend/README.md with installation instructions, connection configuration, account configuration, and verification steps, updated .env and .env.example with MT5 configuration variables (MT5_LOGIN, MT5_PASSWORD, MT5_SERVER, MT5_PATH).

userStories.title: Implement MT5 connection management
userStories.description: As a system, I need to connect to MT5 terminal with proper authentication and error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create MT5Service class with connection methods
Implement initialize() method with login, password, server
Implement shutdown() method for clean disconnect
Implement is_connected() method to check connection state
Implement reconnect() method with retry logic (max 3 attempts)
Add connection state monitoring with heartbeat
Add comprehensive error handling for connection failures
Log all connection attempts and results
Test successful connection to live MT5 terminal

userStories.title: Implement real-time price data fetching
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to fetch real-time price data for all volatility indices.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get_tick() method for current price
Implement get_ticks() method for recent tick data
Implement get_rates() method for OHLCV data
Support timeframes: M1, M5, M15, M30, H1, H4, D1
Implement multi-symbol data fetching (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
Add data validation (check for null/invalid prices)
Add error handling for disconnections during fetch
Test fetching data for all 5 volatility indices
Verify data accuracy (compare with MT5 terminal)

userStories.title: Implement historical data retrieval
userStories.description: As a system, I need to fetch historical OHLCV data for analysis and model training.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement data backfill for missing bars
Store historical data in Parquet format
Implement incremental updates (only fetch new data)
Add progress logging for large data fetches
Test fetching 90 days of historical data
Verify data integrity (no gaps, correct timestamps)

userStories.title: Implement order placement functionality
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to place orders through MT5 when signals are generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement order request structure (symbol, volume, type, price, SL, TP)
Add retry logic for failed orders (max 3 attempts)
Return order ticket number on success

userStories.title: Implement position management
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to manage open positions (modify, close).
acceptanceCriteria: Implement close_position_by_symbol() method (close all for symbol)

userStories.title: Implement account information retrieval
userStories.description: As a system, I need to fetch account information (balance, equity, margin, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: Return: balance, equity, margin, free_margin, margin_level, profit
Implement get_history_orders() method with date range

userStories.title: Implement error handling and reconnection logic
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need comprehensive error handling and automatic reconnection.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement try-except around all MT5 calls
Implement exponential backoff for reconnection (1s, 2s, 4s, max 30s)
Implement circuit breaker (stop trying after 10 consecutive failures)
Log all errors with full context
Implement graceful degradation (continue without MT5 if unavailable)
Test error handling with MT5 terminal closed

userStories.title: Implement MT5 event monitoring
userStories.description: As a system, I need to monitor MT5 events (triggers, position changes).
acceptanceCriteria: Create event callback system for notifications
Test event monitoring with live trading

userStories.title: Create MT5 service documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need documentation for MT5 integration service.
acceptanceCriteria: Document all service methods with examples

functionalRequirements: FR-1: MT5 service must connect to terminal with login credentials
FR-2: MT5 service must handle connection failures gracefully
FR-3: MT5 service must fetch real-time data for all volatility indices
FR-4: MT5 service must place orders with proper validation
FR-5: MT5 service must manage open positions
FR-6: MT5 service must retrieve account information
FR-7: MT5 service must implement automatic reconnection
FR-8: MT5 service must log all operations
FR-9: MT5 service must work with Algo Trading enabled
FR-10: MT5 service must support all volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
nonGoals: No historical data older than 90 days
technicalConsiderations: MT5 terminal must be running and logged in
Algo Trading must be enabled in MT5
Connection can fail randomly (requires robust error handling)
Rate limiting may apply (check with broker)
Order execution delays during high volatility
Weekend trading may have limited liquidity
All MT5 calls should be wrapped in try-except
Data should be validated after fetching
successMetrics: Fetches real-time data for all 5 symbols
Works with paper trading and live trading
